docs:
# Circular Text
Text arranged in a spinning circle around a center point.
## Import
```tsx
import { CircularText } from "@/components/ui/circular-text";
```
## Usage
```tsx
"use client";


<CircularText text="AURORA UI • BUILD BEAUTIFUL • " radius="80px" spinDuration={20} text="AURORA UI • BUILD BEAUTIFUL • " duration={undefined} />
```
## Props
- **text** (string) — default: `"AURORA UI • BUILD BEAUTIFUL • "`: Text
- **radius** (number) — default: `80`: Radius
- **spinDuration** (number) — default: `20`: Spin (s)
- **text** (string) — default: `"AURORA UI • BUILD BEAUTIFUL • "`: Text
- **duration** (number): Duration (ms)
> Requires `"use client"` in the file that renders this component.
Some Aurora UI components use custom Tailwind animations (animate-shimmer, animate-marquee, animate-aurora, etc.). Merge keyframes from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Rydaguy101/aurora-ui/main/tailwind.config.ts into your tailwind.config.
## Install
```bash
npx --yes github:Rydaguy101/aurora-ui add circular-text
# or with shadcn CLI (after aurora-ui init):
npx shadcn@latest add @aurora/circular-text
```
